rationale: scRNA-Seq during 'human iPSC-derived liver bud(LB) differentiation' is an iPSC-to-hepatic differentiation study producing organoid-like liver buds.
Bulk time-series RNA-Seq of 'human iPSC-derived liver bud(LB) differentiation' makes this an iPSC-to-liver differentiation experiment.
Study profiles 'primary human hepatocyte (PHH) cultures' with and without HCV infection and IFN-alpha treatment; the experimental substrate is primary hepatocytes in vitro.
'Patient-derived organoid cultures model human primary liver cancer' establishes long-term tumoroid organoids from HCC/CC/CHC, making organoids the dominant signal.
Hepatoblastoma is a pediatric liver cancer that is not HCC or cholangiocarcinoma, so it falls under 'other liver'.
Multi-tissue pharmacogene survey but the samples captured here are labeled 'Liver_1..16' from healthy individuals, so they represent normal liver tissue.
RNA-seq of '21 HBV-HCC patients' tumor and adjacent non-tumor liver is a clear HCC study on an HBV background.
'Gene Expression Profile of human hepatocellular carcinoma by RNA-seq' comparing 10 HCC tumors to 10 normal livers.
'Fibrolamellar hepatocellular carcinoma (FL-HCC)' is explicitly listed as an HCC subtype in the vocabulary.
'RNA-seq for 9 HCC patients with paired tumor and normal liver tissues' is a direct HCC transcriptomics study.
Study characterizes 'intrahepatic cholangiocarcinoma (iCCA)' tumors and matched non-tumor tissue.
'Low carbohydrate diet study for non-alcoholic fatty liver disease' with paired NAFLD biopsies is a clear NAFLD study.
Hepatoblastoma is a pediatric liver malignancy that does not fit HCC or cholangiocarcinoma categories, so 'other liver' is appropriate.
'Hepatic differentiation of human liver organoids' from adult bile duct cells, with expansion vs differentiation media comparison, is an organoid study.
Paired liver and subcutaneous fat from 'morbidly obese patients undergoing bariatric surgery' is typically framed as NAFLD-spectrum liver biology; liver tissue is directly profiled.
Study focuses on 'erythroid-specific enhancer of ATP2B4' in K562/erythroid cells with liver only as a reference tissue for comparison.
RNA-seq of 'primary human hepatic stellate cells (HSCs) from cirrhotic vs normal livers' directly profiles stellate cells.
'Zone dependent... normal human liver' profiling laser-microdissected periportal vs perivenous hepatocytes from 6 healthy donors is a normal liver study.
'Alagille syndrome, a genetic disorder of bile duct paucity that causes cholestatic liver disease' is explicitly a cholestasis study.
'Bulk RNA-seq of resected human liver tissue from 8 donors' with no disease framing is best classified as normal liver.
Study profiles 'tumor-educated platelets' from blood, not liver tissue, even though hepatobiliary cancer patients are included.
Explicitly 'five different pancreas cancer cell lines' engineered with E47, unrelated to liver biology.
'Iron response of HepG2 cells' is a canonical immortalized hepatocyte cell line experiment.
HUVECs (umbilical vein endothelial cells) overexpressing HIF1a/HIF2a, not liver tissue or cells.
'Primary human hepatic stellate cells (HSCs) isolated from healthy patients' cultured on hydrogels of varying stiffness.
'Gene expression analysis of human hepatocellular cancers' with matched tumor/normal pairs.
'In vitro human liver model by iPSC-derived parenchymal and non-parenchymal cells' generating LPCs, LSECs, and HSCs from hiPSCs.
Compares 'hepatocyte-like cells' derived as hiPSC-Hep and hiHep, benchmarked against PHH (primary human hepatocytes).
Study profiles intrahepatic NK cell subsets sorted from 'perfusion fluid of five healthy human livers' — liver-resident immunology, not any disease category.
Breast cancer metastasis study; liver samples are metastatic breast tumor deposits, not a liver biology study.
CaptureSeq methods paper profiling lncRNAs across 20 human tissues; the included samples are normal liver tissue.
Samples are 'Liver, normal, pool' of donor livers used to profile UGT alternative splicing.
Compares DNA repair gene expression in 'Human Adult Liver' samples against other species.
'Three pairs of hepatocellular carcinoma and adjacent non-tumor tissues' from stage I/II HCC patients with HCV background.
SAM treatment of HCC cell lines HepG2 and SKHep1 versus primary liver cells; dominant signal is immortalized HCC lines.
Pan-tissue circRNA discovery paper; the included samples are 'Liver_rep1/rep2' normal tissue.
Cross-species tissue transcriptome comparison; samples are 'human lv' (liver) normal tissue.
Fetal liver at 12 weeks gestation from an embryonic multi-organ epigenome study; not adult human liver biology and vocabulary lacks a fetal liver tag.
Derives endodermal progenitors from gastric epithelial cells; the 'Fetal-Hep' RNA-seq samples are reference fetal hepatocytes for a gastric-reprogramming study, not a liver study.
Methods study on RNA degradation and fusion detection using UHR (a mixed cell-line reference that includes hepatoblastoma among many others), not a liver biology study.
ENCODE total RNA-seq directly from human liver tissue, no disease focus.
ENCODE 'RNA-Seq on Adult Human Liver Tissue' from donors STL010/STL011, no disease.
ENCODE total RNA-seq from 'human fetal liver tissue from independent donors' — primary liver tissue, no disease focus.
Study of 'human embryonic stem cell-derived hepatocytes (hESC-Heps)' during hepatic lineage restriction.
'Directed in-vitro differentiation' of hESCs and hiPSCs into hepatocyte-like cells.
ENCODE 'RNA-seq of human liver tissue' with no disease annotation.
Cross-species dosage-compensation study, but the human samples here are explicitly adult liver RNA-seq tissue.
'Whole transcriptome analysis of iPSC-derived hepatic organoids cultures' compared to PHHs and liver tissue.
Methodological multi-tissue splicing study, but the included 'human_liver' sample is normal adult liver tissue.
Study of hPSC-derived hemogenic vasculature/AGM-like hematopoietic cells; 'fetal liver-like' is only a comparison phrase, sample is FL_HSPC hematopoietic cells.
Human hepatocytes engrafted into Fah-/- humanized mouse livers to test biliary metaplasia — primary human hepatocytes in vivo.
Gallstone disease gene expression in gallbladder and one liver sample from a gallstone case — liver-relevant biliary disease context.
ENCODE total RNA-seq from GTEx right lobe of liver of a 53-year-old female donor.
ENCODE total RNA-seq from GTEx right lobe of liver of a 53-year-old female donor.
ENCODE small RNA-seq from 'human fetal liver tissue from independent donors', no disease focus.
Roadmap Epigenome project; the included sample is 'polyA RNA sequencing of STL011 Liver Cells', primary liver tissue.
ENCODE small RNA-seq from GTEx right lobe of liver of a 53-year-old female donor.
ENCODE small RNA-seq from GTEx right lobe of liver of a 53-year-old female donor.
INTS13 enhancer activation study in monocytic differentiation/leukemia line; sample is 'CD34_chromRNA' hematopoietic, not liver.
'MIHA is an immortalized human liver cell line' transfected with truncated HBV X protein mutants.
